---
title: "Swap-benchmark visualisation"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
params:
  csffolder: "CSF_Spectronaut_protein_swap"
  dataset: "good_data"
  normalization: "log2"
  swap_type: "protein"   # protein | sample | none
  base_dir: "."
  protein_matrix_rda: ""
  annotation_path: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
})
source(file.path(params$base_dir, "R/figures.R"))
```

## `r params$csffolder` / `r params$dataset` / `r params$normalization`

Swap type: **`r params$swap_type`**

```{r}
annotation <- if (nzchar(params$annotation_path)) fread(params$annotation_path) else NULL
mat <- NULL
if (nzchar(params$protein_matrix_rda) && file.exists(params$protein_matrix_rda)) {
  e <- new.env()
  load(params$protein_matrix_rda, envir = e)
  mat <- get(ls(e)[1], envir = e)
}
```

## Heatmap (top-500 by variance)

```{r}
if (!is.null(mat)) fig_heatmap(mat, annotation = annotation)
```

## NA-pattern heatmap

```{r}
if (!is.null(mat)) fig_na_heatmap(mat, annotation = annotation)
```

## Per-sample density

```{r}
if (!is.null(mat)) print(fig_density(mat))
```

## Swap schematic

```{r, results='asis'}
if (params$swap_type == "protein") {
  cat("Schematic figure for the protein swap lives in `vignettes/figures/protein_swap.png` (drawn in §8.4).")
} else if (params$swap_type == "sample") {
  cat("Schematic figure for the sample swap lives in `vignettes/figures/sample_swap.png` (lifted from CSF_swap_visualization.qmd).")
} else {
  cat("Mix-of-Proteome: no swap, ground truth comes from species labels.")
}
```
